hero.description: Building **scalable architectures**, reliable APIs, bulletproof database schemas and measurable performance.

highlights: Built internal management systems including **CRM**, **Ecommerce**, and **Warehouse Management** (**tasks, claims, import, export, shipping**)
Developed **web scraping pipelines** and **auction/bidding systems** for JP platforms
Automated purchasing and bidding workflows on **Mercari, Yahoo Auctions** (replacing manual human operations)
Designed **JPY-VND financial** system with **bank statement crawling**
Sprint planning, task delegation, deadline tracking
Built CRM Web app & Mobile app using **Appsheet**
Setup automated reporting systems: **Google Sheets + Python**
Built **Looker Studio dashboards** for the leadership team
Established **operational processes** for CS and Warehouse

ecommerce.title: Ecommerce Genkin
ecommerce.description: Cross-border e-commerce shopping and bidding platform.
achievements: Optimized **Django ORM** for large data crawling pipeline, significantly reducing **N+1 queries**.
Built automated purchasing & bidding system for **Mercari, Yahoo Auctions** using **Selenium**.
Designed **Celery async worker** pipeline with retry logic for highly reliable crawling.
Migrated legacy database schema with **zero downtime** on production.
Fully automated AWS infra (S3, EC2, Lambda) + **Redis + Docker + GitLab CI/CD**.

crm.title: Genkin CRM
crm.description: Internal management system for revenue, finance, orders, warehouse and customers.
achievements: Architected **Security Middleware** & optimized **Advanced Django ORM** for high-load performance.
Built multi-currency (**JPY/VND**) financial management system with automated bank reconciliation.
Integrated module for periodic **bank statement retrieval** and transfer matching.
Reduced dashboard load with **Redis caching layer**; PostgreSQL query optimization.
**Docker + GitLab CI/CD** pipeline; zero-downtime deployment to AWS.

maido.title: Maido Agency
maido.description: Operations management and workflow automation for a marketing agency serving SMEs in Vietnam.
achievements: Integrated **Meta Ads API** to automate data collection across multiple advertising accounts.
Developed **campaign reporting systems** with real-time performance indicators (KPIs).
Engineered an **automated alert system** for budget fluctuations and ad performance anomalies.

infra.title: Cloud & DevOps Infrastructure
infra.description: Scalable containerized cloud infrastructure on AWS using **IaC (Terraform)**.
achievements: Containerized the system with **Docker** and used **Nginx** for high-performance proxying.
Managed AWS infrastructure (VPC, ECS, RDS) with **Terraform** for high availability and scaling.
Built **100% automated CI/CD** pipelines using **GitLab CI**.

nodejs_ecommerce.title: NodeJS Backend
nodejs_ecommerce.description: Distributed backend system designed for high-load e-commerce operations.
achievements: Integrated **RabbitMQ** and **Apache Kafka** for asynchronous task handling and data streaming.
Implemented **Elasticsearch** for high-performance product searching and filtering.
Built a robust **Inventory Management** system with real-time stock synchronization.

nestjs_ecommerce.title: NestJS Ecommerce
nestjs_ecommerce.description: Scalable, modular backend for e-commerce and content ecosystems built with NestJS.
achievements: Engineered using **Module-based Architecture** for clean code and superior maintainability.
Managed **Data Integrity** with **TypeORM** and strict **Database Migrations**.

portfolio.title: Portfolio AI & Vibe Coding
portfolio.description: Experimental project focused on **Vibe Coding** and **AI Agentic Workflows**.
achievements: Leveraged **AI Agents** to co-architect and implement the entire professional system.
Applied **Vibe Coding** philosophy for rapid high-fidelity UI/UX development.
Integrated **GSAP animations** and **multi-language support (i18n)**, SEO optimized.
